openrouter-free / Auto Free Router random available free model
summary: The local models and OpenRouter-free route were used for speculative next-step review while H035 documentation was being closed.
Returned suggestions centered on clock/reset delays, descriptor alignment, cache/coherency, descriptor format, and command-buffer interpretation.
Those suggestions either duplicate already closed H009-H027 evidence or require a concrete source/register reference before they should become H036.
decision: Do not patch from these model outputs alone. Keep using the ThinkCentre gateway for bounded speculative audits, but require source-backed deltas for runtime behavior changes.
